# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a VPC with public and private subnets for our three-tier application. Configure basic routing and internet gateway. Keep networking simple for rapid deployment - we'll add VPC flow logs and monitoring later.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud network security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_network_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  Secure three-tier VPC architecture with public and private subnets,
  internet gateway, NAT gateway, and properly restricted routing.

Parameters:
  EnvironmentName:
    Description: Environment name prefix for resource naming
    Type: String
    Default: production
    AllowedValues:
      - production
      - staging
      - development
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid environment name

  VpcCidrBlock:
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    AllowedPattern: '^10\.0\.0\.0/16$'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be 10.0.0.0/16

  PublicSubnet1Cidr:
    Description: CIDR block for Public Subnet 1
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
    AllowedPattern: '^10\.0\.[0-9]{1,3}\.0/24$'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid subnet within the VPC CIDR

  PublicSubnet2Cidr:
    Description: CIDR block for Public Subnet 2
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.2.0/24
    AllowedPattern: '^10\.0\.[0-9]{1,3}\.0/24$'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid subnet within the VPC CIDR

  PrivateAppSubnet1Cidr:
    Description: CIDR block for Private Application Subnet 1
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.10.0/24
    AllowedPattern: '^10\.0\.[0-9]{1,3}\.0/24$'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid subnet within the VPC CIDR

  PrivateAppSubnet2Cidr:
    Description: CIDR block for Private Application Subnet 2
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.11.0/24
    AllowedPattern: '^10\.0\.[0-9]{1,3}\.0/24$'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid subnet within the VPC CIDR

  PrivateDataSubnet1Cidr:
    Description: CIDR block for Private Data Subnet 1
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.20.0/24
    AllowedPattern: '^10\.0\.[0-9]{1,3}\.0/24$'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid subnet within the VPC CIDR

  PrivateDataSubnet2Cidr:
    Description: CIDR block for Private Data Subnet 2
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.21.0/24
    AllowedPattern: '^10\.0\.[0-9]{1,3}\.0/24$'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid subnet within the VPC CIDR

Resources:
  # ============================================================
  # VPC
  # ============================================================
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidrBlock
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      InstanceTenancy: default
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-vpc'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  # ============================================================
  # Internet Gateway (for public tier only)
  # ============================================================
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-igw'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  InternetGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  # ============================================================
  # Elastic IPs for NAT Gateways
  # ============================================================
  NatGateway1EIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    DependsOn: InternetGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-nat-eip-1'

  NatGateway2EIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    DependsOn: InternetGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-nat-eip-2'

  # ============================================================
  # Public Subnets (Web/Presentation Tier)
  # ============================================================
  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet1Cidr
      # Do NOT auto-assign public IPs; assign explicitly per resource
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-public-subnet-1'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: public
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet2Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-public-subnet-2'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: public
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  # ============================================================
  # Private Application Subnets (Application/Logic Tier)
  # ============================================================
  PrivateAppSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet1Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-private-app-subnet-1'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: application
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  PrivateAppSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet2Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-private-app-subnet-2'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: application
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  # ============================================================
  # Private Data Subnets (Data Tier - most restricted)
  # ============================================================
  PrivateDataSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateDataSubnet1Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-private-data-subnet-1'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: data
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  PrivateDataSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateDataSubnet2Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-private-data-subnet-2'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: data
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  # ============================================================
  # NAT Gateways (in public subnets, for private subnet egress)
  # ============================================================
  NatGateway1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatGateway1EIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-nat-gw-1'

  NatGateway2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatGateway2EIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-nat-gw-2'

  # ============================================================
  # Public Route Table
  # ============================================================
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-public-rt'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  DefaultPublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: InternetGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2

  # ============================================================
  # Private Application Route Tables (one per AZ for HA NAT)
  # ============================================================
  PrivateAppRouteTable1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-private-app-rt-1'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  DefaultPrivateAppRoute1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateAppRouteTable1
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway1

  PrivateAppSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateAppRouteTable1
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet1

  PrivateAppRouteTable2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-private-app-rt-2'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  DefaultPrivateAppRoute2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateAppRouteTable2
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway2

  PrivateAppSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateAppRouteTable2
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet2

  # ============================================================
  # Private Data Route Tables (isolated - no internet egress)
  # Data tier should not have outbound internet access
  # ============================================================
  PrivateDataRouteTable1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-private-data-rt-1'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  PrivateDataSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateDataRouteTable1
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateDataSubnet1

  PrivateDataRouteTable2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-private-data-rt-2'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  PrivateDataSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateDataRouteTable2
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateDataSubnet2

  # ============================================================
  # Network ACLs - Defense in depth layer
  # ============================================================

  # --- Public Subnet NACL ---
  PublicSubnetNACL:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-public-nacl'

  # Allow inbound HTTP
  PublicNACLInboundHTTP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicSubnetNACL
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 443
        To: 443

  # Allow inbound HTTP (for redirect to HTTPS)
  PublicNACLInboundHTTPRedirect:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicSubnetNACL
      RuleNumber: 110
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 80
        To: 80

  # Allow inbound ephemeral ports (return traffic from internet)
  PublicNACLInboundEphemeral:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicSubnetNACL
      RuleNumber: 200
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535

  # Allow inbound from VPC CIDR (for internal communication)
  PublicNACLInboundVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicSubnetNACL
      RuleNumber: 300
      Protocol: -1
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidrBlock

  # Explicit deny all other inbound
  PublicNACLInboundDenyAll:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicSubnetNACL
      RuleNumber: 32000
      Protocol: -1
      RuleAction: deny
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0

  # Allow outbound to internet (HTTPS for updates, etc.)
  PublicNACLOutboundHTTPS:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicSubnetNACL
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      Egress: true
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 443
        To: 443

  # Allow outbound HTTP
  PublicNACLOutboundHTTP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicSubnetNACL
      RuleNumber: 110
      Protocol: 6
      Egress: true
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 80
        To: 80

  # Allow outbound ephemeral ports (responses to inbound requests)
  PublicNACLOutboundEphemeral:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicSubnetNACL
      RuleNumber: 200
      Protocol: 6
      Egress: true
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535

  # Allow outbound to VPC CIDR
  PublicNACLOutboundVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicSubnetNACL
      RuleNumber: 300
      Protocol: -1
      Egress: true
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidrBlock

  # Explicit deny all other outbound
  PublicNACLOutboundDenyAll:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicSubnetNACL
      RuleNumber: 32000
      Protocol: -1
      Egress: true
      RuleAction: deny
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0

  PublicSubnet1NACLAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicSubnetNACL

  PublicSubnet2NACLAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicSubnetNACL

  # --- Private Application Subnet NACL ---
  PrivateAppSubnetNACL:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-private-app-nacl'

  # Allow inbound only from VPC CIDR
  PrivateAppNACLInboundVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateAppSubnetNACL
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: -1
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidrBlock

  # Allow inbound ephemeral from internet (NAT return traffic)
  PrivateAppNACLInboundEphemeral:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateAppSubnetNACL
      RuleNumber: 200
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535

  # Explicit deny all other inbound
  PrivateAppNACLInboundDenyAll:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateAppSubnetNACL
      RuleNumber: 32000
      Protocol: -1
      RuleAction: deny
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0

  # Allow outbound to VPC
  PrivateAppNACLOutboundVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateAppSubnetNACL
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: -1
      Egress: true
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidrBlock

  # Allow outbound HTTPS (for updates via NAT)
  PrivateAppNACLOutboundHTTPS:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateAppSubnetNACL
      RuleNumber: 200
      Protocol: 6
      Egress: true
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 443
        To: 443

  # Allow outbound ephemeral (responses)
  PrivateAppNACLOutboundEphemeral:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateAppSubnetNACL
      RuleNumber: 300
      Protocol: 6
      Egress: true
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535

  # Explicit deny all other outbound
  PrivateAppNACLOutboundDenyAll:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateAppSubnetNACL
      RuleNumber: 32000
      Protocol: -1
      Egress: true
      RuleAction: deny
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0

  PrivateAppSubnet1NACLAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet1
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateAppSubnetNACL

  PrivateAppSubnet2NACLAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet2
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateAppSubnetNACL

  # --- Private Data Subnet NACL (most restrictive) ---
  PrivateDataSubnetNACL:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-private-data-nacl'

  # Allow inbound only from application subnets (app tier 1)
  PrivateDataNACLInboundApp1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateDataSubnetNACL
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet1Cidr
      PortRange:
        From: 3306
        To: 3306

  # Allow inbound from app tier 2
  PrivateDataNACLInboundApp2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateDataSubnetNACL
      RuleNumber: 110
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet2Cidr
      PortRange:
        From: 3306
        To: 3306

  # Allow inbound PostgreSQL from app tier 1
  PrivateDataNACLInboundApp1PG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateDataSubnetNACL
      RuleNumber: 120
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet1Cidr
      PortRange:
        From: 5432
        To: 5432

  # Allow inbound PostgreSQL from app tier 2
  PrivateDataNACLInboundApp2PG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateDataSubnetNACL
      RuleNumber: 130
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet2Cidr
      PortRange:
        From: 5432
        To: 5432

  # Allow inbound ephemeral from data subnets (for replication between data nodes)
  PrivateDataNACLInboundDataSubnets:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateDataSubnetNACL
      RuleNumber: 200
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidrBlock
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535

  # Explicit deny all other inbound
  PrivateDataNACLInboundDenyAll:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateDataSubnetNACL
      RuleNumber: 32000
      Protocol: -1
      RuleAction: deny
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0

  # Allow outbound ephemeral to app subnets (responses)
  PrivateDataNACLOutboundApp1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateDataSubnetNACL
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      Egress: true
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet1Cidr
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535

  PrivateDataNACLOutboundApp2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateDataSubnetNACL
      RuleNumber: 110
      Protocol: 6
      Egress: true
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet2Cidr
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535

  # Allow outbound within data tier (replication)
  PrivateDataNACLOutboundDataTier:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateDataSubnetNACL
      RuleNumber: 200
      Protocol: 6
      Egress: true
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidrBlock
      PortRange:
        From: 3306
        To: 3306

  PrivateDataNACLOutboundDataTierPG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateDataSubnetNACL
      RuleNumber: 210
      Protocol: 6
      Egress: true
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidrBlock
      PortRange:
        From: 5432
        To: 5432

  # Explicit deny all other outbound - data tier has NO internet access
  PrivateDataNACLOutboundDenyAll:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateDataSubnetNACL
      RuleNumber: 32000
      Protocol: -1
      Egress: true
      RuleAction: deny
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0

  PrivateDataSubnet1NACLAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateDataSubnet1
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateDataSubnetNACL

  PrivateDataSubnet2NACLAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateDataSubnet2
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateDataSubnetNACL

  # ============================================================
  # Security Groups - Least privilege per tier
  # ============================================================

  # --- Public Tier Security Group (ALB/Web) ---
  PublicTierSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for public tier - allows HTTPS from internet
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          Description: Allow HTTPS from internet
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          Description: Allow HTTP from internet for HTTPS redirect
      SecurityGroupEgress: []
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-public-tier-sg'

  # Explicit egress rule to app tier only
  PublicTierToAppTierEgress:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupEgress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref PublicTierSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 8080
      ToPort: 8080
      DestinationSecurityGroupId: !Ref AppTierSecurityGroup
      Description: Allow traffic to application tier

  # Allow HTTPS outbound for health checks and external calls
  PublicTierHTTPSEgress:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupEgress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref PublicTierSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 443
      ToPort: 443
      CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Description: Allow HTTPS outbound

  # --- Application Tier Security Group ---
  AppTierSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for application tier - accepts from public tier only
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 8080
          ToPort: 8080
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref PublicTierSecurityGroup
          Description: Allow traffic from public tier ALB
      SecurityGroupEgress: []
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-app-tier-sg'

  # App tier egress to data tier (MySQL)
  AppTierToDataTierMySQLEgress:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupEgress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref AppTierSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 3306
      ToPort: 3306
      DestinationSecurityGroupId: !Ref DataTierSecurityGroup
      Description: Allow MySQL to data tier

  # App tier egress to data tier (PostgreSQL)
  AppTierToDataTierPGEgress:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupEgress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref AppTierSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 5432
      ToPort: 5432
      DestinationSecurityGroupId: !Ref DataTierSecurityGroup
      Description: Allow PostgreSQL to data tier

  # App tier HTTPS egress (for external API calls, updates via NAT)
  AppTierHTTPSEgress:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupEgress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref AppTierSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 443
      ToPort: 443
      CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Description: Allow HTTPS outbound via NAT

  # --- Data Tier Security Group (most restrictive) ---
  DataTierSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for data tier - accepts from app tier only
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref AppTierSecurityGroup
          Description: Allow MySQL from application tier
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 5432
          ToPort: 5432
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref AppTierSecurityGroup
          Description: Allow PostgreSQL from application tier
      # No egress to internet - data tier is fully isolated
      SecurityGroupEgress: []
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-data-tier-sg'

  # Data tier egress only within data tier for replication
  DataTierReplicationEgress:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupEgress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref DataTierSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 3306
      ToPort: 3306
      DestinationSecurityGroupId: !Ref DataTierSecurityGroup
      Description: Allow MySQL replication within data tier

  DataTierReplicationPGEgress:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupEgress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref DataTierSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 5432
      ToPort: 5432
      DestinationSecurityGroupId: !Ref DataTierSecurityGroup
      Description: Allow PostgreSQL replication within data tier

  # Allow data tier to receive replication from itself
  DataTierReplicationIngress:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref DataTierSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 3306
      ToPort: 3306
      SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref DataTierSecurityGroup
      Description: Allow MySQL replication within data tier

  DataTierReplicationPGIngress:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref DataTierSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 5432
      ToPort: 5432
      SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref DataTierSecurityGroup
      Description: Allow PostgreSQL replication within data tier

  # ============================================================
  # VPC Flow Logs - Essential for security monitoring
  # ============================================================
  VPCFlowLogsRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: vpc-flow-logs.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: VPCFlowLogsPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                  - logs:DescribeLogGroups
                  - logs:DescribeLogStreams
                Resource: !GetAtt VPCFlowLogsLogGroup.Arn

  VPCFlowLogsLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/vpc/flow-logs/${EnvironmentName}'
      RetentionInDays: 90
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-vpc-flow-logs'

  VPCFlowLog:
    Type: AWS::EC2::FlowLog
    Properties:
      DeliverLogsPermissionArn: !GetAtt VPCFlowLogsRole.Arn
      LogGroupName: !Ref VPCFlowLogsLogGroup
      ResourceId: !Ref VPC
      ResourceType: VPC
      TrafficType: ALL
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-vpc-flow-log'

  # ============================================================
  # RDS Subnet Group for data tier
  # ============================================================
  DatabaseSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: Subnet group for database instances in private data subnets
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateDataSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateDataSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-db-subnet-group'

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-VPCId'

  VPCCidrBlock:
    Description: VPC CIDR Block
    Value: !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-VPCCidrBlock'

  PublicSubnet1Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 1 ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-PublicSubnet1Id'

  PublicSubnet2Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 2 ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-PublicSubnet2Id'

  PrivateAppSubnet1Id:
    Description: Private Application Subnet 1 ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-PrivateAppSubnet1Id'

  PrivateAppSubnet2Id:
    Description: Private Application Subnet 2 ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-PrivateAppSubnet2Id'

  PrivateDataSubnet1Id:
    Description: Private Data Subnet 1 ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateDataSubnet1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-PrivateDataSubnet1Id'

  PrivateDataSubnet2Id:
    Description: Private Data Subnet 2 ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateDataSubnet2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-PrivateDataSubnet2Id'

  PublicTierSecurityGroupId:
    Description: Public Tier Security Group ID
    Value: !Ref PublicTierSecurityGroup
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-PublicTierSGId'

  AppTierSecurityGroupId:
    Description: Application Tier Security Group ID
    Value: !Ref AppTierSecurityGroup
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-AppTierSGId'

  DataTierSecurityGroupId:
    Description: Data Tier Security Group ID
    Value: !Ref DataTierSecurityGroup
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-DataTierSGId'

  DatabaseSubnetGroupName:
    Description: Database Subnet Group Name
    Value: !Ref DatabaseSubnetGroup
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-DBSubnetGroupName'

  NatGateway1Id:
    Description: NAT Gateway 1 ID
    Value: !Ref NatGateway1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-NatGateway1Id'

  NatGateway2Id:
    Description: NAT Gateway 2 ID
    Value: !Ref NatGateway2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-NatGateway2Id'
